violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Establishment unable to provide updated food safety certificate. License on file expired.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed grease build up on side of grill and table next to grill.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed vent filters had build up of debris.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Food trays not stored inverted or covered to proctect from contamination.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed dirt and debris build up on ceiling, walls and floors in kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
